summary: Base W7 — prescribed ~19 mpw (mileage bump from W6's ~17), polarized ~85% Z1. SWAP this week (athlete call 6/2): Tue ↔ Wed flipped — Hyp A pulled to Tue (today), threshold 3×8 @ T + MHR-retest finisher pushed to Wed. Still no same-day lift/run (Tue is the no-run day this week instead of Wed), so no §2.A ordering friction. Mon DONE: Z1 easy 35 min @ 10:36/mi, HR 157, Vomero Plus, SI + Achilles clean — first non-reactive Achilles read since the Adj #34 flare. Held under the prescribed 40 (mileage hold); hill strides HELD again (Adj #44; earliest debut W9 Mon since W8 is a deload). FLAGS: (1) Achilles trending clean — soleus-progression gate (Adj #44) now resolves at TODAY's Hyp A: if AM-clean, deepen knee ~80° (Adj #31); else hold 60s flat. Calf 335 stays held until Achilles AM-clean (Adj #40, Sat item). (2) Run-MHR retest travels with the run to Wed (Adj #45) — capture peak HR off a max-effort finisher after the 3×8 T work; treat as a floor (fatigue may cap it). (3) Hold mileage while the Achilles fully settles. Live load progressions: Incline BB +5 → 145 today (expect RPE 8-9, near top of LP; AMRAP/TM re-test ~W8 deload), DB lat → 27.5 today (Adj #29), cable crunch → 70 today (Adj #32), lat pulldown → 150 Sat (Adj #35); chest-supp row 85 reassess Sat (Adj #36); tri pushdown 55 / preacher 55 holds persist (Adj #38/#39). Shoe: Vomero for long/easy, Zoom Fly 6 short tempo only while Achilles reactive (Adj #34). Accutane tendon risk persists (§11.E).

HILL STRIDES HELD again — earliest debut now W9 Mon (W8 deload); release calf/soleus holds if Achilles stays AM-clean (Adj #44).

days.note: SWAP (athlete call): Hyp A pulled Wed → today, threshold pushed to Wed. Incline BB +5 → 145 (Adj #27; expect RPE 8-9, near top of LP, AMRAP/TM re-test ~W8); DB lat raise → 27.5 (Adj #29); tri pushdown hold 55 until clean set 3 (Adj #38); preacher hold 55 (Adj #21/#30); cable crunch → 70 if set 3 ≥RIR 2 (Adj #32); soleus 60s, deepen knee ~80° only if Achilles AM-clean else hold (Adj #31/#44); rear-delt 125. days.session: Threshold 3×8 min @ T (90 s rec) + MHR retest finisher — run only, swapped from Tue
days.note: SWAP: threshold pushed Tue → Wed. §4.C W7, longer reps (3×8 vs W6's 5×5). Hold 8:00/mi (locked T pace, Adj #26); anchor RPE/pace not HR (Adj #9). RUN-MHR RETEST FOLDED IN (Adj #45): after the 3×8 T work + ~3–5 min easy jog, finish with a max-HR effort — treadmill 1%, ~2–3 min progressive build, last 30–60 s flat-out — capture peak HR. Treat the peak as a FLOOR (end-of-session fatigue may cap it); if ≥195–205, recompute Z2/Z3 per Adj #9. Zoom Fly 6 OK for this short tempo if Achilles tolerates.
§4.C W7 Thu midweek recovery (revert to rest on yellow/red mornings, §11.C). Vomero, flat, honest Z1 floor — no creep. Hold mileage if Achilles still reactive.
§4.C W7 Fri. Flat strides, cadence cap ≤180 spm (Adj #25). Anchor pace/RPE not HR (Adj #9). Shoe per Achilles status (Vomero if easy-dominant).

Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine. Achilles AM check if still reactive.
